evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Establish data quality standards and best practices across teams
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The responsibilities emphasize establishing standards, best practices, and robust architectures with no velocity or shipping-speed language present anywhere in the JD.
evidence.domain_risk: embedded with clients across healthcare, government, retail, and finance sectors
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role spans multiple client sectors including finance and government but the JD language is generic consulting framing rather than explicit compliance/regulatory language, placing it at moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Lead analytics team development and knowledge sharing initiatives
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The role leads team development and establishes standards across teams at an established consultancy with a full Azure platform stack already deployed, indicating a mature function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Work with platforms including Fabric, Databricks, Synapse, Data Factory, and Data Lake
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Naming the precise Azure ecosystem tool stack (Fabric, Databricks, Synapse, DAX, M-query) shows technical specificity only someone who has done this job would include.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Establish data quality standards and best practices across teams
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role establishes standards and leads analytics team development, making the data function itself the primary audience rather than a specific commercial or product team.
evidence.autonomy_level: acting as a trusted advisor who translates business challenges into robust data architectures
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role is framed around leading, establishing standards, and shaping team development, all strategic-direction verbs, rather than executing scoped work for others.
evidence.ai_role: Implement and research generative AI applications for innovation
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is expected to implement and research generative AI applications, building capability that AI systems would run on, making them an enabler.
evidence.testing_framing: Establish data quality standards and best practices across teams
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality standards are framed as something the candidate establishes and owns across teams, using an explicit ownership verb, making this a responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Establish data quality standards and best practices across teams
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Data quality standards are a named responsibility but the JD is otherwise dominated by delivery, advisory, and innovation framing, reflecting moderate rather than high risk concern.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: design and implement scalable analytics solutions
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role mixes designing new scalable solutions with establishing standards across existing teams and clients, indicating mixed greenfield and fix/scale work.
evidence.language_gate: Strong Dutch communication skills (written and verbal)
evidence.loss_aversion: Establish data quality standards and best practices across teams — reflects operational concern about data quality rather than compliance/regulatory framing.
